_publications._publicationTitle: A randomized placebo-controlled lovastatin trial for neurobehavioral function in neurofibromatosis I.

_contextSnippet: There were no differential treatment effects for changes in neural activity during spatial working memory (SCAP performance; all P ≥ 0.05)
details: No differential treatment effects detected for changes in neural activity during spatial working memory performance (all P ≥ 0.05)
